summary: Iteration 6 — Full E2E regression for InstaChat across all 13 features added this session (registration with 3 security Qs, forgot-password self-service, admin ban/unban/reset/permanent-delete, CSV exports, image+voice upload + serve-back, real-time WS delivery, mobile composer fix, toaster reposition, save-to-device buttons). Backend: 26/26 pytest pass (test_full_regression.py). Frontend: ForgotPassword UI happy-path verified end-to-end (case-insensitive answers BLUE/JAN accepted; success state shown; new password works at API; old password returns 401). Admin Console shows all 4 stat cards, both tabs, Users/Conversations CSV buttons, and 29×(Reset/Ban/Delete) buttons per non-admin user. Reset modal renders 12-char temp password and Copy. Delete confirm modal opens and Cancel works. Non-admin alice→/admin correctly redirects to /chat. Mobile composer bottom edge at y=773 on 390×844 viewport = 71px gap above the Emergent badge zone (spec required ≥50px). Toaster position confirmed `bottom-right` in App.js. Recovery answers verified hashed in MongoDB under `recovery.{birthday,favorite_color,favorite_number}_hash` with no plaintext for `1 jan 2000` or `blue` stored elsewhere on user doc. WebSocket regression: a websockets-based test confirms bob receives a message frame within ~3s of alice POSTing /api/messages; banned user WS handshake closes with code 4403 or HTTP 403. File uploads succeed for image/png, audio/mp4 (.m4a iOS), audio/webm (Chrome) and the /api/files/{path}?auth=… serve-back returns 200 + correct content-type.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 1091 lines (was 932) — strongly recommend splitting into routers/auth.py, routers/messages.py, routers/admin.py, routers/uploads.py per the 700-line guideline; this is the single biggest maintainability risk.
Chat.jsx is 697 lines and mixes WS handler, MediaRecorder, optimistic-send reconciliation, and rendering — extract hooks (useChatSocket, useVoiceRecorder, useOptimisticMessages) for testability.
Admin.jsx (629 lines) embeds the conversation viewer + user management + media renderer — split conversation viewer into its own component for reuse.

ForgotPasswordInput accepts only `new_password` (no confirm_password) — confirm-match is correctly enforced frontend-only, which is the right pattern but worth documenting in the API contract so future agents don't add it as an extra_forbidden field.
ResetPasswordInput requires an (empty) JSON body — consider making the body optional (Body(default=None)) so admin can POST with no body and the API still generates a temp password.
Recovery answers are normalized via field_validator to lowercase+trim before hashing — correctly enables 'BLUE' matching 'blue'. No issue, just confirming.

WS endpoint correctly rejects banned users (close 4403) and uses `if user is None`; the failed WS handshake during page load on /chat shown in console is the standard reconnect-on-token-refresh behavior, not a bug.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all probed flows (forgot-password UI, admin gating, admin user-row buttons, reset modal, delete modal, mobile composer geometry, toaster position)

test_credentials: Admin: jashanpreetgamer2@gmail.com / Gamerz1234518102008. Existing: alice/alice123, bob/bob12345. New seeded users this run: test_regok_*, test_forgot_*, test_wrong_*, test_banflow_*, test_pwreset_*, test_victimrp_*, test_victim_*, test_banme_*, test_uifp_*, test_dup_* (all with password Passw0rd!23 except test_uifp_* which now uses NewPass987!).
seed_data_creation: ~12 TEST_-prefixed users created via pytest fixtures (one per test class) plus 1 user via the UI flow (test_uifp_*). Several conversations exist alice<->bob with WS-delivered messages. Cleanup: left in DB — admin can purge via the new DELETE /admin/users/{id} endpoint.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 13 features work end-to-end. Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_full_regression.py covers registration+recovery, login, forgot-password (5 paths), admin gating/ban/unban/reset/delete (+ all guards), CSV exports, file uploads (image/m4a/webm), banned /auth/me + WS reject, and real-time WS delivery. Old suite /app/backend/tests/test_admin_ban_csv.py from iteration_5 still passes (14/14). Run both together: `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. For UI re-verification, key data-testids: forgot-password-page, forgot-{identifier,birthday,favorite-color,favorite-number,new-password,confirm-password}-input, forgot-password-submit-button, forgot-password-success, goto-forgot-password-link, admin-page, stat-{users,convos,messages,online}, tab-{users,conversations}, export-{users,conversations}-csv-button, admin-user-{username}-{reset-password,ban,unban,delete}-button, reset-password-modal, reset-password-value, delete-confirm-modal, message-input. Toaster confirmed `position="bottom-right"` in /app/frontend/src/App.js:35.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found in this iteration.
